name: mulch
description: Token-efficient memory system using Code Mode - only 2 tools: search() and execute(). 99.9% token savings. v2.1.0 adds Smart Domain Inference.
author: RuneweaverStudios

tools.name: search
tools.description: Filter memories using named safe filters - only loads relevant learnings, not entire history

params.filter: Named filter: byType, byDomain, byKeyword, recent, all
params.keyword: Search keyword (for byKeyword filter or plain string query)

tools.name: execute
tools.description: Record or query learnings. Smart domain inference automatically detects domain from content if not provided.

params.domain: Domain name (optional - auto-inferred if not provided)
